title: TNT's Resources/smol stuff
description: A themed resource pack with dark gui, high quality hearts, and more! Once abandoned, now BACK, with a FULL REDO! also known as TNT's smol stuff
body:
![The edition text for the in game title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc93085b5e14d95296b907e68582e2ef45c6f859.png)

Features: Hearts, armor, hotbar, gui, crosshair/attack indicator, sweep attack, armor.

Detailed overview: The normal hearts are a detailed purple version, and absorbtion hearts are a more detailed red variant. Wither hearts are lighter to make it easier to tell if they are dead or wither. I did miss a few hearts, which are on the way. The armor bar is purple-ified as well. The sweep attack is colored purple, with a red underline. Recently, I added the creative inventory, with very high quality textures. Buttons are themed with the dark aspect, like the rest of the pack.

All resources in this pack (So far) have the same pixel size as vanilla minecraft.

More resources on the way!
